source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Postcards Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Twin Falls, Ketchikan, Alaska
description: Historic gelatin silver postcard of the Twin Falls near Ketchikan, showing two cascading streams pouring through dense old-growth Tongass rainforest. Produced by the Thwaites Studio, Ketchikan, card number 5617, between 1900 and 1940.
alt: Historic sepia postcard of Twin Falls near Ketchikan with cascading water through dense rainforest
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov and visually confirmed
